name: incident-report
description: Standalone HTML incident / postmortem report: header with severity and status, TL;DR, a dotted timeline, root-cause prose with an optional diff, an impact table, and owned action items.

slots.description: Incident title; used in <title> and the h1.
Severity label; rendered in the .pill.sev pill.
Resolution status pill, e.g. Resolved | Mitigating | Investigating.
Extra neutral pills: duration, detected time, owner.
Ordered timeline of events; each entry has a dot variant.
Root-cause prose; may include an inline diff code-panel.
Key/value rows quantifying blast radius (requests failed, error rate, users, data loss, SLA).
Owned action items; add class 'done' when complete.
Footer provenance / authorship line, auto-filled by the agent.

shape.timeline[]: { time: string, event: string, dot: enum[default,impact,mitigated] }
shape.followups[]: { owner: string (avatar initials), action: string, due: string, done: boolean }
